scenarios.title: Accidental liquid damage within plan term
scenarios.description: Customer dropped iPhone XR in water causing it to stop functioning. The claim is filed within the 24-month plan term, first ADH event for this device.

service_fee.notes: Service fee applies for each ADH claim as stated in section 3.2

policy_references.snippet: ADH coverage applies to operational failure caused by unexpected and unintentional external events like liquid contact, subject to a $49 service fee per claim.
Coverage is valid within 24 months from original iPhone purchase date.

scenarios.reasoning: The liquid damage resulted from an accidental and unintentional external event during the 24-month coverage period. This is explicitly covered under section 3.2, which allows repair or replacement after payment of a $49 service fee. This is the first ADH claim, so it counts toward the two-event ADH limit.
